content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 12, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 12, 2026, focused on repository maintenance, dependency updates, and a significant cleanup of stale issues and third-party plugin proposals. The team improved runtime reflection and addressed performance issues related to duplicate action result logging.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### Runtime and Performance Improvements
- Integrated task-completion assessment into the reflection evaluator pipeline to improve runtime reflection accuracy ([#6721](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6721)).
- Optimized LLM context by removing duplicate action result formatting from the `RECENT_MESSAGES` provider, ensuring `ACTION_STATE` remains the sole source with a 10k token budget ([#6551](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6551)).

### Dependency Management
- Performed a security update for the Python package group, bumping `cryptography` from 46.0.5 to 46.0.6 ([#6696](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6696)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
- No new pull requests were opened on this date.

## CLOSED ISSUES

### Stale and Deprecated Feature Cleanup
- Closed numerous stale issues and feature requests (8+ months old), including requests for streaming support, TEE improvements, and various platform integrations ([#5386](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/5386), [#4461](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/4461), [#4528](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6053), [#4720](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/4720), [#4921](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/4921), [#4908](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/4908),
